title: Wave-3 🟢: static-page smoke batch — legal×3, docs, demo×3, error, not-found
acceptance_criteria: Mechanical batch (same smoke pattern, low individual complexity — one spec, one owner): legal/contact, legal/privacy, legal/terms, docs, demo/accessibility, demo/performance, demo/seo, error.tsx, not-found.tsx.

Each: HTTP 200 (or the intended status for error/not-found), a primary heading/landmark visible, and ZERO uncaught pageerror + zero non-benign console errors (reuse the benign-console filter pattern from landing.spec.ts; do not import from it — replicate the small constant).
All tagged @non-blocker per qa-checklist.md (🟢 — logged only, no gate impact).
npm run typecheck passes; lists under playwright; does not touch other specs or support files.
output_format: code plus a one-line note confirming every listed static page has a smoke case
